== Red Doe ♀ ==
A mare as fast as the wind. She can only carry one person, but she's as fast as a Ferrari!

=== Begin Friendship ===
To obtain Red Doe, fully defeat [[Hitmen|Hitman No.12]]

=== ☆☆☆ > ★★☆ ===
After 8 letters back and forth, Red Doe arrives at [[Home Base]] and gifts {{Relink|Hitman No.12 License|green}}.

=== ★★☆ > ★★★ ===
After 11 letters back and forth, Red Doe moves in permanently with her minion, Nightmare Steed. The [[Mailbox#Red Buck|Red Buck]] storyline also begins. 

== Rent ==
[[File:Red Doe rent.png|frameless|left]]

Red Doe rent is collected on '''Friday''' and found as a pile of hay and sticks.

 '''Normal Rent''': {{RewardIconWithText|Wood, +500}}; {{RewardIconWithText|Stone, +500}}

 '''Rare Rent''': {{RewardIconWithLink|Golden Wheat|orange}}

{{clear}}

== Relics ==
Upgrading these will earn  Travel Speedup!

{| class="mw-collapsible wikitable"  
!Relic Tier
!Reward
|-
|★
|Travel Speedup +30m
|-
|★★
|Travel Speedup +30m
|-
|★★★
|Travel Speedup +30m
|-
|★★★★
|Travel Speedup +1h
|-
|★★★★★
|Travel Speedup +1h30m
|-
|★★★★★★
|Travel Speedup +2h
|}

{| class="wiki-table" style="width:100%; text-align:center;" 
!style="background-color:var(--blue-bg);"|{{Reimg|Throne of Pope}}{{Relink|Throne of Pope}}
!style="background-color:var(--blue-bg);"|{{Reimg|Atilla Horseshoe}}{{Relink|Atilla Horseshoe}}
!style="background-color:var(--purple-bg);"|{{Reimg|Armstrong's Footprint}}{{Relink|Armstrong's Footprint}}
!style="background-color:var(--purple-bg);"|{{Reimg|Mars Rover}}{{Relink|Mars Rover}}
|-
!style="background-color:var(--orange-bg);"|{{Reimg|Somersault Cloud}}{{Relink|Somersault Cloud}}
!style="background-color:var(--orange-bg);"|{{Reimg|Wheel of Fortune}}{{Relink|Wheel of Fortune}}
!style="background-color:var(--orange-bg);"|{{Reimg|Particle Collider}}{{Relink|Particle Collider}}
!style="background-color:var(--orange-bg);"|{{Reimg|Trojan Horse}}{{Relink|Trojan Horse}}
|}

== Red Doe's Cloudstep ==
Red Doe once joined Wudang and learned to apply the Cloudstep technique into galloping, giving her incredible speed.

{| class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wikitable"
!Level
!Research Skill<br>Required
!B-tad Cost
!Skill 1
!Skill 2
|-
|1||0||0||ART +5||Free Gene Speedup (Mutant) +30s
|-
|2||180||2k||ART +10||Free Gene Speedup (Mutant) +1m30s
|-
|3||190||4.5k||ART +15||Free Gene Speedup (Mutant) +2m
|-
|4||200||8k||ART +20||Free Gene Speedup (Mutant) +2m30s
|-
|5||210||12.5k||ART +25||Free Gene Speedup (Mutant) +3m
|-
|6||220||18k||ART +30||Free Gene Speedup (Mutant) +3m30s
|-
|7||230||24.5k||ART +35||Free Gene Speedup (Mutant) +4m
|-
|8||240||32k||ART +40||Free Gene Speedup (Mutant) +4m30s
|-
|9||250||40.5k||ART +45||Free Gene Speedup (Mutant) +5m
|-
|10||260||50k||ART +50||Free Gene Speedup (Mutant) +5m30s
|-
|11||270||60.5k||ART +55||Free Gene Speedup (Mutant) +6m
|-
|12||285||72k||ART +60||Free Gene Speedup (Mutant) +6m30s
|-
|13||300||84.5k||ART +65||Free Gene Speedup (Mutant) +7m
|-
|14||315||98k||ART +70||Free Gene Speedup (Mutant) +7m30s
|-
|15||330||112k||ART +75||Free Gene Speedup (Mutant) +8m
|-
|16||345||123k||ART +80||Free Gene Speedup (Mutant) +8m30s
|-
|17||360||144k||ART +85||Free Gene Speedup (Mutant) +9m
|-
|18||375||162k||ART +90||Free Gene Speedup (Mutant) +9m30s
|-
|19||390||180k||ART +95||Free Gene Speedup (Mutant) +10m
|-
|20||400||200k||ART +100||Free Gene Speedup (Mutant) +10m30s
|-
|21||420||220k||ART +105||Free Gene Speedup (Mutant) +11m
|-
|22||440||242k||ART +110||Free Gene Speedup (Mutant) +11m30s
|-
|23||460||264k||ART +115||Free Gene Speedup (Mutant) +12m
|-
|24||480||285k||ART +120||Free Gene Speedup (Mutant) +12m30s
|-
|25||500||309k||ART +125||Free Gene Speedup (Mutant) +13m
|-
|26||520||333k||ART +130||Free Gene Speedup (Mutant) +13m30s
|-
|27||540||357k||ART +135||Free Gene Speedup (Mutant) +14m
|-
|28||560||381k||ART +140||Free Gene Speedup (Mutant) +14m30s
|-
|29||580||405k||ART +145||Free Gene Speedup (Mutant) +15m
|-
|30||600||429k||ART +150||Free Gene Speedup (Mutant) +15m30s
|}

==Commander==
A good commander can make the troops more effective!

Commander can only be leveled up as far as Red Doe's Cloudstep is. 

{| class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wikitable"
!Level
!B-tad Cost
!Skill 1
!Skill 2
|-
|1||0||Demon Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Nightmare Steeds in battle, Troop DEF +10
|-
|2||4k||Demon Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Nightmare Steeds in battle, Troop DEF +20
|-
|3||6k||Demon Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Nightmare Steeds in battle, Troop DEF +30
|-
|4||8k||Demon Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Nightmare Steeds in battle, Troop DEF +40
|-
|5||10k||Demon Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Nightmare Steeds in battle, Troop DEF +50
|-
|6||12k||Demon Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Nightmare Steeds in battle, Troop DEF +60
|-
|7||14k||Demon Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Nightmare Steeds in battle, Troop DEF +70
|-
|8||16k||Demon Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Nightmare Steeds in battle, Troop DEF +80
|-
|9||18k||Demon Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Nightmare Steeds in battle, Troop DEF +90
|-
|10||20k||Demon Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Nightmare Steeds in battle, Troop DEF +100
|-
|11||22k||Demon Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Nightmare Steeds in battle, Troop DEF +110
|-
|12||24k||Demon Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Nightmare Steeds in battle, Troop DEF +120
|-
|13||26k||Demon Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Nightmare Steeds in battle, Troop DEF +130
|-
|14||28k||Demon Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Nightmare Steeds in battle, Troop DEF +140
|-
|15||30k||Demon Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Nightmare Steeds in battle, Troop DEF +150
|-
|16||32k||Demon Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Nightmare Steeds in battle, Troop DEF +160
|-
|17||34k||Demon Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Nightmare Steeds in battle, Troop DEF +170
|-
|18||36k||Demon Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Nightmare Steeds in battle, Troop DEF +180
|-
|19||38k||Demon Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Nightmare Steeds in battle, Troop DEF +190
|-
|20||40k||Demon Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Nightmare Steeds in battle, Troop DEF +200
|-
|21||42k||Demon Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Nightmare Steeds in battle, Troop DEF +210
|-
|22||44k||Demon Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Nightmare Steeds in battle, Troop DEF +220
|-
|23||46k||Demon Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Nightmare Steeds in battle, Troop DEF +230
|-
|24||48k||Demon Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Nightmare Steeds in battle, Troop DEF +240
|-
|25||50k||Demon Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Nightmare Steeds in battle, Troop DEF +250
|-
|26||55k||Demon Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Nightmare Steeds in battle, Troop DEF +260
|-
|27||60k||Demon Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Nightmare Steeds in battle, Troop DEF +270
|-
|28||65k||Demon Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Nightmare Steeds in battle, Troop DEF +280
|-
|29||70k||Demon Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Nightmare Steeds in battle, Troop DEF +290
|-
|30||75k||Demon Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Nightmare Steeds in battle, Troop DEF +300
|}

== Research Ability ==
Below is a table of the research manual cost to upgrade each research gene. Red Doe specializes in '''Demon Gene''' and therefore the research manual cost for the Demon is halved. 

{| class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wikitable"
!Level
!Manuals Required 
|-
|1-10||1
|-
|11-20||2
|-
|21-30||3
|-
|31-40||4
|-
|61-70||20
|-
|71-80||40
|-
|81-90||60
|-
|91-95||80
|-
|97||200
|-
|98||400
|-
|99||600
|-
|100||800
|}

== Minion - Nightmare Steed ==
The strange creature comes from the flames of hell. The weight of an adult is measured in tonnes, but they are very mobile. They're also very loyal to their masters and are a popular servant to senior demons.

===Special Ability - Hellfire===
Per 10 Nightmare Steeds in battle, Troop Fire RES +1 (multiplied by minion level)

=== Minion Relics ===
Upgrading these relics will buff your Nightmare Steeds!

{| class="mw-collapsible wikitable"
!Name
!★☆☆☆☆☆
!★★☆☆☆☆
!★★★☆☆☆
!★★★★☆☆
!★★★★★☆
!★★★★★★
|-
!style="background-color:var(--blue-bg);" |{{reimg|Throne of Pope}}<br>{{relink|Throne of Pope}}
|HP +1%
|DEF +1%
|ATK +1%
|RUSH +1%
|
|
|-
!style="background-color:var(--blue-bg);" |{{reimg|Atilla Horseshoe}}<br>{{relink|Atilla Horseshoe}}
|HP +1%
|DEF +1%
|ATK +1%
|RUSH +1%
|
|
|-
!style="background-color:var(--purple-bg);" |{{reimg|Armstrong's Footprint}}<br>{{relink|Armstrong's Footprint}}
|HP +2%
|DEF +2%
|ATK +2%
|RUSH +2%
|All Stats +3%
|
|-
!style="background-color:var(--purple-bg);" |{{reimg|Mars Rover}}<br>{{relink|Mars Rover}}
|HP +2%
|DEF +2%
|ATK +2%
|RUSH +2%
|All Stats +3%
|
|-
!style="background-color:var(--orange-bg);" |{{reimg|Somersault Cloud}}<br>{{relink|Somersault Cloud}}
|HP +4%
|HP +4%
|HP +4%
|HP +4%
|HP +4%
|HP +4%
|-
!style="background-color:var(--orange-bg);" |{{reimg|Wheel of Fortune}}<br>{{relink|Wheel of Fortune}}
|RUSH +4%
|RUSH +4%
|RUSH +4%
|RUSH +4%
|RUSH +4%
|RUSH +4%
|-
!style="background-color:var(--orange-bg);" |{{reimg|Particle Collider}}<br>{{relink|Particle Collider}}
|ATK +4%
|ATK +4%
|ATK +4%
|ATK +4%
|ATK +4%
|ATK +4%
|-
!style="background-color:var(--orange-bg);" |{{reimg|Trojan Horse}}<br>{{relink|Trojan Horse}}
|DEF +4%
|DEF +4%
|DEF +4%
|DEF +4%
|DEF +4%
|DEF +4%
|}

[[Category:Partners]]
[[Category:Hitmen]]
[[Category:Friday Rent]]
[[Category:Mutant Gene Speedup Boost]]
[[Category:Minion DEF Boost]]
[[Category:Demon Minions]]
